respondents: Indian Ex Services League through Its President

order_significance_and_impact_assessment.ai_generated_executive_summary: The Delhi High Court adjourned the First Appeal due to insufficient time available for hearing and judgment. The matter has been rescheduled for September 3, 2025.
order_significance_and_impact_assessment.plain_language_summary_for_litigants_out: Your case in the Delhi High Court has been postponed to September 3, 2025, as the judge did not have enough time to hear arguments today.

arguments_and_reasoning_analysis.court_reasoning_for_decision: The court noted that it would not be possible to pass judgment during the short period of time available.

ratio_decidendi_extracted.statement: Adjournment necessitated when insufficient time available for proper hearing and judgment.
